result: If I could shape the world in one single way, I would work toward ensuring that every person has basic security: enough food, clean water, reliable shelter, basic health care, and access to education. In other words, I’d aim to eliminate extreme poverty and the needless suffering it causes, because those conditions underpin so many other injustices and limit human potential. The ripple effects of such a change would be profound—better health, greater opportunity, more stable societies, and a stronger sense of shared humanity.

The ripple effects of such a change would be profound—better health, greater opportunity, more stable societies, and a stronger sense of shared humanity.
